scope_contract: In --changed-files mode this inspector emits findings ONLY for the listed files, tagged with introduced_in_diff per Mechanism (ii). Global detector results are reported in mandatory_script_outputs.observations only, not in findings.*. Pre-existing violations in untouched files are non-blocking per default-safe rule.

commands/push.md.placement: correct — commands/ directory, naming convention lower-case matches commands/README.md
commands/push.md.references: indexed in commands/README.md line 34 and root INDEX.md line 73; orphan-command detector reports 0 orphans

scripts/execute-push.py.placement: correct — scripts/ directory, kebab-case .py naming consistent with write-commit-grant.py, spec-check.py, write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py
scripts/execute-push.py.references: referenced explicitly in commands/push.md at lines 144, 148, 165, 183 (invocation example); indexed in scripts/README.md and scripts/INDEX.md; orphan-script detector reports 0 orphans for this file

detect_orphan_scripts.note: execute-push.py: 0 orphan findings. Full detector output includes pre-existing rows not in this diff.

observations.note: The following pre-existing issues were detected by mandatory scripts. They are NOT in the changed files and are non-blocking per default-safe rule (introduced_in_diff: false).

items.reason: No references in commands/agents/scripts (examples only — full detector JSON in mandatory_script_outputs.detect_orphan_scripts)
items.severity_per_detector: major (>30 days old) or minor (<35 days old)

summary.changed_files_verdict: CLEAN — 0 cleanliness violations introduced in this diff

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed the 0-finding verdict for both changed files is supportable. Four PROPOSED_FIX items were raised: (1) global findings must not appear under findings.* arrays; (2) out-of-scope rows need blocking/introduced_in_diff tags, not severity replacement; (3) one evidence claim about commands/push.md reference chain was inaccurate (execute-push.py does not reference commands/push.md as a file, the reverse is true); (4) global orphan-script summary was non-exhaustive. One OBSERVATION_ONLY: no safety rules violations found.

findings.issue: Global findings must not be emitted as actual findings in --changed-files mode; product-owner.md and scripts/todo/*.py must not appear under findings.* arrays
findings.proposed_fix: Keep all findings.* arrays empty for this run. Move global detector results to mandatory_script_outputs.observations with introduced_in_diff: false, cleanliness_finding: false, and blocking: false.
findings.rationale: Global pre-existing rows were moved to mandatory_script_outputs.observations; all findings.* arrays are empty.

findings.issue: Advisory/non-blocking labeling was being used as a severity replacement for out-of-scope rows; severity and blocking disposition should be separate fields
findings.proposed_fix: Preserve detector severity and add blocking: false and introduced_in_diff: false fields. Do not replace severity with 'advisory'.
findings.rationale: Each observation item now carries explicit severity_per_detector, introduced_in_diff: false, and blocking: false fields.

findings.issue: Inaccurate evidence claim: draft stated commands/push.md is referenced 'by scripts/execute-push.py documentation'. execute-push.py does not reference commands/push.md as a file; the reference direction is the reverse — commands/push.md references scripts/execute-push.py.
findings.proposed_fix: Reword to: 'commands/push.md is indexed in commands/README.md and root INDEX.md; orphan-command detector reports 0 orphans. scripts/execute-push.py participates in the /push workflow but is not a direct file-reference to commands/push.md.'
findings.rationale: changed_files_analysis.commands/push.md references field corrected to accurately describe the reference direction.

findings.issue: Global orphan-script summary was non-exhaustive; detect-orphan-scripts.sh output includes additional pre-existing rows (e.g. scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh) beyond those mentioned
findings.proposed_fix: Either omit global examples entirely, or label them 'examples only' and add: 'Full detector JSON is recorded separately; in_changed_files: 0'.
findings.rationale: Added scripts/install/tmp-cleanup-install.sh to observations and labeled the section as examples only with in_changed_files_count: 0 in detect_orphan_scripts.

findings.issue: OBSERVATION_ONLY: No proposed deletion or archive action for either in-scope file, so there is no Safety Rules violation. Final changed-file summary of 0 cleanliness findings is supportable.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All four PROPOSED_FIX items applied: findings.* arrays kept empty; global rows moved to observations with introduced_in_diff/blocking/cleanliness_finding tags; evidence claim for commands/push.md reference direction corrected; orphan-script observation section now includes tmp-cleanup-install.sh and is labeled examples-only with in_changed_files count.
